open_gaps.SEC-002: LOW, unchanged. No numPages>1000 cap at the viewer.js loadDocument() boundary; merge.js addFiles() has no cumulative-bytes/page cap. Client-side-only DoS (uploader's own tab) on the 1.6 GiB box. Developer task — fix once at the viewer load boundary to cover all per-page consumers (viewer, thumbnails, merge, text-extract, bg-borders, compress raster loop). This tick's new module (command-palette.js) adds NO new load boundary or per-page loop, so it does not extend SEC-002. No new server-side risk.

notes: 35 JS modules (+1 since 12:25 review). Reviewed new module command-palette.js (TASK-345): Ctrl/Cmd+K quick-action runner that is a pure VIEW over action-registry.js — it never touches a PDF, has no load boundary, and adds no per-page loop, so it does not affect SEC-002. XSS posture: every option is built with document.createElement + textContent (cmd.title into a <span>, cmd.shortcut into a <kbd>); zero innerHTML/eval/Function/document.write. Uses native <dialog>.showModal() for modal/focus-trap/Escape; results rendered via listEl.replaceChildren(); fuzzy filter is local string ops only. Command list comes from the registry (developer-registered actions), not user data; ActionRegistry.run(id) reuses the same dispatch path as toolbar buttons (no new privilege). Clean. Full-JS audit across all 35 modules: every innerHTML hit is `= ''` (clearing) — zero innerHTML with user/PDF data (search.js hit is a comment); zero eval/Function/document.write/outerHTML; zero fetch/XHR/remote-src/insertAdjacentHTML. upload.js still enforces ext+MIME+empty+size(50MB)+%PDF- magic with sanitized filenames. Live headers verified: full resource CSP (default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; img-src 'self' blob: data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'self'; ...), X-Frame-Options SAMEORIGIN, Referrer-Policy strict-origin-when-cross-origin, X-Content-Type-Options nosniff; .mjs served text/javascript+nosniff. Path blocking: .git/config 403, CLAUDE.md 403, scripts/cron-orchestrator.sh 403, js/app.js 200, js/command-palette.js 200. No hardcoded secrets in js/ (grep clean).
